description.content: Submit a batch of OpenTelemetry log records. The body must be an `ExportLogsServiceRequest` encoded as JSON or Protobuf. The resource attribute `highlight.project_id` is required to route the logs to the owning Highlight project.

Native OpenTelemetry Protocol (OTLP) HTTP/JSON ingestion endpoint for structured logs. Accepts standard `ExportLogsServiceRequest` payloads. Logs are stored in ClickHouse for sub-second full-text search and pattern detection in the Highlight dashboard.


Contact Support:
 Name: Highlight Support
